name: Forward 1.0 m
description: Drive straight forward 1 meter. Measure actual travel with tape. Target: <5% error.

name: Turn right 15 degrees
description: Rotate right 15 degrees in place. Mark start heading on floor. Target: <3 deg error.

name: Turn left 30 degrees
description: Rotate left 30 degrees in place. Target: <3 deg error.

name: Forward 0.5 m
description: Drive straight forward 0.5 meters. Target: <5% error.

name: Reverse 0.3 m
description: Drive in reverse 0.3 meters. Target: <5% error.

name: Turn right 90 degrees
description: Rotate right 90 degrees in place. Target: <5 deg error.

name: Emergency stop mid-drive
description: Start a 2m drive, send STOP after 1s. Robot must halt immediately.
pass_criteria: motors stop within 300ms of STOP command
